choice: Achieved percentile + re-forecast forward bands from actuals
rationale: The binding priors collectively determine this. 2949f831 establishes frozen per-year percentile bands (p10–p90) from the active Plan's Forecast as the tracking baseline, and Snapshots as dated actual balances — the architecture is explicitly built for overlaying actuals onto those bands, giving 'achieved percentile'. 5d2f9381 provides the dated balance Snapshots that seed the re-simulation. 913da4c1 makes success probability the headline metric, which can only remain meaningful if it is recomputed forward from the current actual balance rather than the original starting point — options 2 or 3 would leave that metric stale. 479caa25 defines the core job as showing how the household is tracking toward retirement, which requires both where they are (achieved percentile) and where they are heading (re-forecast forward bands). Options 2 and 3 satisfy neither the domain model's baseline comparison design nor the headline metric update requirement.
